review_text: Excellent caravan park. Welcoming service, Michael very accomodating and helpful with all information on wineries, food and trails to explore. The caravan park is exemplary.
Great place to stay to see the Clare Valley. Very clean and Michael has lots of information and ideas for you to do.

What an absolutely wonderful experience, Michael was so friendly b day and helpful. Also very knowledgeable with the area. Beautiful tidy park in immaculate condition. Great showers and toilets ,also laundry. Well done would highly recommend staying here
Great family owned park, quiet, clean and very friendly with spotless amenities. Highly recommend
Lovely park, great setting
It is a little gem of a park. Clean,nice size sites and friendly helpful owners. Will definitely be back
Our second time here. Lovely small well maintained caravan park. Excellent facilities, close to everything but no good if you have children.

Just completed another excellent stay - thank you!  Such a lovely park and so well situated for the Riesling Trail and other lovely places to visit ( for ‘places’ read vineyards!). The site is really well looked after and it was great to see how much it had developed since our last visit 4 years ago. Highly recommend you stay here if you can 👌

What a great caravan park. Extremely well maintained, well located, and boutique.

We love that it is a privately owned park and the owners are 100% on point 👌🏼

Support small business and stay here on your next trip.

Just a fabulous two days in a neat clean and well appointed park in a beautiful part of regional South Australia. MIchael and Hayley were fabulous hosts. They provided us some fabulous suggestions for a further travels west

The most beautiful lush park with owners just as amazing. |The amenities are very clean, with shower pressure also amazing. |Location is second to none and owners were able to provide amazing local knowledge and recommendations to local wineries and dining. | |Absolutely worth the stop given the location, and although just of the hwy, it’s far enough to not hear the road noise all night!||Highly recommend a visit!
Awesome small scale park, reasonably priced, great facilities and friendly staff.

This is a top park. Everything is clean and tidy. Camp kitchen very helpful. Amenities clean and well maintained. Staff friendly and accommodating with information re wineries etc. Location is handy to wineries if that's your thing.
This is a fantastic caravan park. We were disappointed with the cabin. It was fairly old and a bit rundown. Our low star score was because of the price. Well over $200 per night.

Sehr schöner, kleiner privat geführter Platz.
Idealer Ausgangspunkt zur Erkundung des Claire Valley.
Sehr viele Vögel mit der entsprechenden Geräuschkulisse am Abend 😉
Such a beautiful park to stay with the caravan. Thankyou Michael for your great recommendations for the area, much appreciated.

We stayed here with some friends in our caravans on the Australia Day long weekend and it was fantastic. We've booked to come again for another long weekend. It's wonderful that this small, but lovely, park is owned and operated by a local family ... so much nicer than a larger park. Michael's communication leading up to our stay was first class. He sent us a heap of information about things that were happening in the valley that we could be involved in.
The amenities are very clean, shower water pressure is good and consistent temp and the caravan spots we booked had both grass and shade. I'd highly recommend a stay here if you're a couple or going with a group of adults ... not a lot for the kids to do but Clare has another caravan park if you are looking for that.

We stayed for two nights and had a wonderful experience. The owner is incredibly knowledgeable about the area and shared so much helpful information, including a printed list of recommended places to visit.

The whole caravan park and all the sites were beautiful and absolutely spotless. The camp kitchen was very well equipped and just as clean. You can truly feel that the owners love what they do, and it shows throughout the entire caravan park.

Highly recommend this place to others and definitely encourage supporting this great small privately owned business.
Beautifully presented park for a peaceful stay, all the amenities you require. Close to Clare and surrounding area. Hosts are wonderful, looking forward to our next visit.
Excellent park Excellent location Excellent facilities Michael Park owner extremely helpful Thanks for having us  Mike Kim & Rocky the dog  we will be back

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at the site, the grounds were immaculate and amenities were extremely well kept. The owners were extremely friendly and welcoming and very flexible with staying arrangements. Highly recommend this park when staying in the Clare Valley.

We had a 10 night stay over the 2025 Xmas period. It is a lovely quiet caravan park, green grass for our borders and very peaceful.  A credit to its owners Just delightful. The Clare Valley is very dog friendly.
Michael and Hayley are wonderful hosts. The after hours checkin was easy to use. The cabin was clean, comfortable and the shower has good water pressure.

We have just spent two days at this great park in their 2 bedroom cabin. The cabin was fitted out beautifully with everything that we needed.Park owner Michael was very helpful in giving us plans on what could be done and places to visit around the area. For a small park it was fantastic and would recommend it to anyone when visiting the Clare Valley.

What a great little family-owned caravan Park! It’s only small but so well kept and with a really friendly welcome. It’s situated within walking distance of lovely wineries and a local bus provided for a return trip to the Seven Hills hotel for a great dinner!
Terrific park. Very clean and tidy well maintained. Friendly owners. Pet friendly. Well located and close to nice walk along the riesling trail.

Wonderful smaller caravan park. Perfect location for a stay in the Clare Valley. Very neat and tidy. The hosts were very friendly. We have stayed here twice now. It is our go to caravan park in the Valley!
What a great place, such a warm welcome. The site was flat, toilets and showers great. Perfect location for us in a beautiful area. So glad we didn’t stay actually in Clare but stayed here instead.

We booked as our first choice was booked out, but so glad we did! This one is better!! A quiet location, surrounded by wineries and local history. It’s lovely having personalised service from the owners themselves, who took great pride in welcoming us, and kept us informed when needed.|Everything was clean, homely and well maintained. A great service.
Located right in the middle of the wine area.   I would label this as a boutique park.   Family owned who are obviously improving the park.
Beautiful Park, very well maintained, friendly & accommodating. Thanks for a great stay
Family run, wonderful people and a great location to access wineries (including three in walking distance). Certainly our choice before the other big chain operated caravan parks.
Great caravan park run by super friendly owners. The amenities are clean, the place is well tended, it's in a good location. Highly recommend.

A lovely country, charm filled private caravan park, lovely clean amenities and a camp kitchen ready to accept guests including table cloths. We only stayed 1 night as we were in transit, but we definitely will be wanting to stay longer next time.

One of the most friendliest caravan parks that we have been to.  A wonderful country welcoming feel. It would have to have the best presented camp kitchen I have seen in a long time would rate higher if possible+⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Beautiful, well maintained grounds. Ample room for large van and vehicle. Excellent advice on places to visit and recommendations on where to eat. Friendly and helpful owners. Easy access to the van site.

Es war meine erste Nacht mit einem kleinen Camper und genau der richtige Ort um die besten Erfahrungen als Newcomer zu sammeln. Michael war super nett und hat mir viele Tipps und Empfehlungen gegeben. Die sanitären Anlagen und die Küche waren sehr gepflegt und sauber. Man hat gemerkt, dass es ein familiengeführtes Business ist. Weiter so!!! Und Danke nochmal….. Carmen aus Stuttgart (Deutschland)
A smaller family run park. Sites ok. Amenities were ok. A good spot to journey from for Clare valley and surrounds.

Excellent park. Small family run park with great lawns and easy access to level sites for a big caravan. Amenities block was a bit small but very clean. Very helpful owners.
Will happily visit again.
A great stay in the most beautiful part of the country. Michael was a great host.
A lovely quiet park.  Managers very friendly and helpful. Amenities very clean and park tidy.

A lovely small caravan park , busy enough but quiet except for birds which were so good to listen to. Clean ammenities, all you could want. Backs onto a winery and close to others and the Riesling trail. We would love to come back stay longer.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay. The park is very peaceful and perfectly located for exploring the area.
Michael and Hayley were very helpful and accommodating.
Would definitely recommend staying here for couples and small groups. Hope to return again in the future.

These guys have absolutely nailed it! Small fish are sweet and this small caravan park is certainly sweet! It’s small but that’s its beauty! The attention to detail is amazing. The lawns, the amenities, a proper large stone gravel driveway that doesn’t drive you crazy, all neat sites beautifully done, and the friendliness of the owners makes you proud to see young owners having a crack and doing it so well. It puts one off larger parks once you experience this gem!
Everything was perfect we’ll be back!! Thank you!
Very friendly, comfortable and very clean. Will be back and highly recommend.

Great family run park. On arrival Hayley was very welcoming, informative and told us all the local attractions. Park amenities were lovely and clean. Park is quiet, not on main road, sites are easy to access.Would definitely recommend and stay again.

A glorious family run small van park in a great location to enjoy the Clare Valley region. Communal fire pit to meet and talk with fellow travellers. Highly recommend.
Thank you.
Tim & Karen.

Due to a change in our itinerary we needed to look for overnight accommodation and came across Clare Valley Caravan Park. This boutique family owned and operated park was perfect. Michael and Hailey, owners, were lovely, friendly and informative about the area. Ablution blocks and camp kitchen were well maintained and very clean. Great access to all the wineries in the Clare Valley region with some great eateries   Couldn’t ask for more. Will be back one day and stay longer.

Es ist ein kleiner, gut gelegener Stellplatz. Die Eigentümer waren sehr nett und hilfsbereit. Wir haben gute Tipps für unseren Aufenthalt bekommen. Besonders gut hat uns die wirklich toll ausgestattete Campküche gefallen. Es war abends sehr schlechtes Wetter und wir waren froh, nicht in dem engen Wohnmobil kochen und essen zu müssen.
What a great place community area

We loved this park. We stayed in our tent on a beautiful grassy site. Amenities were super clean and the kitchen had everything we needed.
You can tell the owners have invested in their family owned business - the grounds are very well maintained and they were very welcoming.
Loved the walks nearby.
We will book again.

Stayed in my campervan on their site. Owner gave me great tips for the local area.
Grounds were really clean and quiet. Excellent facilities - close to every camp site, super clean and in good condition.
Showers and toilets were also very clean and easily accessible with hot water.
Would definitely stay again! Thank you
Beautiful quiet location to then explore the Clare Valley. Great recommendations from Park on wineries and places to visit.
Great little park. Quiet, friendly, clean with ample sized sites. Very accessible to all that Clare Valley has to offer.

On depart when hooking up my car I received an electric shock from my caravan. I relayed my concerns to the park owner and was quickly dismissed as being my problem. As a electrician with 45 years of experience I tested my caravan when I arrived home and found no fault. It is concerning that the owner failed to acknowledge there may have been a problem and have it checked. Maybe it will take someone getting electrocuted to have it looked at by an electrician. Safety for your customers first!

Stayed for a long weekend. Park is privately owned and have stringent rules about check-ins with caravans. Must be in by 6pm. With no flexibility. On a weekend if not in by 6pm you forfeit your booking for the weekend. If you happen to work Monday-Friday 6pm is difficult if you live more than an hour away.
We had to go through a few hoops and dollars to get our van to Clare in time for check-in. We didn’t want to cancel as friends were staying at the park and we had activities and other bookings arranged.
We were quite annoyed when a caravan entered the park Saturday morning. Spoke with these people and the rules were different. They had booked for Friday but were allowed to enter Saturday due to something coming up???
Your park, your rules but buyer beware read the fine print. We will not return and would not recommend

Great little caravan park in Leasingham. Right near the reisling trail and short trip to Auburn and Watervale. Heaps to see and do - wineries, gin distillery and make sure you go to the watervale hotel. The owners are super friendly and welcoming.

Had a quick overnight stay in our tent. Michael put us on a lovely grassy site with power. The bathrooms were super clean and the shower beautiful. Very clean camp kitchen. Highly recommend this small, friendly, family owned park.

What a little gem👍
Quiet and relaxing, best kept secret!!!! Young owners giving it a good crack for excellence.
Congratulations for the effort. Easy to reisling trail, wineries etc etc. great little park.
We will be back😁😁😁😁

Caravan sites are not level and if i were to level the van i needed to take off the jockey whell .We were given a grass site that turned to swamp when it rained. There was no drain points at grassed bays. Not enough Toilets a showers which are dated. I wouldn't stay here again

We stayed 3 nights in a powered caravan site. The park is not a large site and the amenities are clean and well maintained for their age. The park is in a great location close to the Riesling Trail for those that ride bikes. Great friendly service.
Fantastic little, young family run park. Absolutely spotless and have now stayed for 3years in a row. Would definitely stay & recommend again.

Such a cute little park! I stayed in a small cabin with my dog and it was perfect for one night. Spotless and homely with some nice touches I think you only get with a privately owned park. Definitely recommend a stop here.
We enjoyed our overnight caravan stop here. The silos photo and music show after sunset was excellent, better than just the normal painted silos.

We enjoyed our stay at Clare Valley Caravan Park. Amenities were very clean. Small privately owned park with generous size sites. We caught the courtesy bus to the pub and back. Walked to the 2 wineries close by. Lovely stay.

A beautiful quaint little privately owned caravan park. Tucked away off the main road it's a quiet place not too far from Clare township. The owners are very friendly & helpful. The grounds are well maintained. Although a little dated the facilities are immaculately clean. I loved the serenity & would highly recommend a stay here for those who don't want the hustle & bustle of big caravan parks. Definitely a place I would stay again if I am in the region
Fantastic little caravan park. Nice sites, close to wineries, super friendly on check in. Will definitely be returning for a longer stay!

Michael & Hayley the park owners, Thank you for our incredible stay at your caravan park it is a beautiful place with nice clean amenities.
Michael I thank you with your assistance with your mechanic contact rectifying my electric brake issue and allowing me to fix it in the park. We made it all the way home to WA without further imcident.
Thanks again.
Michael & Kathy

Small park, good facilities (no wifi but good phone coverage for hotspotting). Very quiet & safe-feeling. Easy walking distance to Claymore and O'Leary Walker cellar doors - both have excellent wines and platters.  Would happily stay here again.

Very quiet park in a great location for wine tasting. Recently renovated, Hayley & Michael have done a great job and provide a wealth of information on where to eat, drink and explore. Highly recommended

Nice park but unfortunately  we had to abandon our stay due to management  allowing a guest to let her cats roam around the park. As we have a dog (kept on lead at all times), the cats drove him crazy and shouldn't  be allowed to roam free.
Great location and facilities.  Michael was extremely helpful with lots of local information.  Look forward to returning on another trip.

We booked a grass and gravel site for 3 nights and extended to 5 nights. Michael and Hayley made us feel welcome and, on checking in, gave many suggestions on where to go, eat and local wineries to try. The park itself was not too big. I think there are 28 van sites and a few cabins. The amenities are spotless and the showers have good pressure.  It is so close to the Riesling trail, with 2 wineries in walking distance (recommend the grazing platter at O’Leary & Walker) and the Watervale General Store is 2 kms up the road - we had breakfast there several times.  Watervale Pub also delicious for dinner. Would definitely recommend this van park and would not hesitate to stay again.
Clear, and extremely friendly and helpful staff

A lovely little caravan park in the Clare Valley. We had a 3 night stay on a powered site and it was perfectly situated to use as a base to explore the area. Michael and Hayley (owners) were friendly and had many excellent suggestions of where to visit and dine. Ammenities were spotless and well looked after. Thoroughly recommend as a place to stay if visiting the Clare.
Had both cabin & powered sites. Park is well maintained. Cabins are comfortable & suitable for self catering. Amenities are clean.

If you’re looking for a small privately owned caravan park with large sites, immaculately clean and friendly owners this is the park for you. As a bonus the award winning watervale hotel with an amazing all day menu is just up the road. We will be back and you guys are doing a fantastic job.

Very friendly and helpful welcome by Michael.  Great sites, great clean facilities. Friendly small park situated in a quiet area. Liked the fact that everyone should be in and settled before 6 to avoid disturbing others. Would definitely stay here again.

Michael was very helpful in sharing local knowledge of various wineries and restaurants. The park is very well maintained with a very cute camp kitchen.
Michael was very helpful when I needed a few screws for a quick fix on my caravan.  Super helpful guy. Highly recommend to stay here

Fantastic little caravan park - amazing customer service and obviously looking to continue improving facilities. Although older facilities were very clean - showers were very good with lots of hot water. Would definitely recommend to stay there.

This is an amazing caravan park to stay at. Beautifully maintained, quiet location, close to so many wineries. The owner operators, Michael and Hailey are very friendly and welcoming. Michael's knowledge of the district, its wineries and surrounding areas is very helpful for planning your days out and about

What a great, quiet and well maintained park.  The powered sites are large.  The amenities block is a little old but very clean and the showers were hot.  Note the shower rose was high enough too - a nice change.

There's a camp kitchen and a communal brazier.  The park has easy access to The Riesling (cycling) Trail and the Wine and Wilderness Walking Trail.

There's also a cellar door and dining options right next door.

We opted out of the other park in town after seeing all the vans packed in like sardines.  There were also a number of bad reviews for it.

I thoroughly recommend this park.

Fabulous 👌  Park, Hayley & Michael lovely people, great knowledge too. Hayley recommend O'Leary Walker winery, which is just next door,  it was just fantastic, great wine, views & the platter we had was absolutely sensational, which Hayley also recommended to have. Park was quaint & small which we really really loved, we squeezed in an extra night & so glad we did, a 3 night stay for us and can't recommend here highly enough 👌🙏👌

Lovely caravan park.
Very clean and neat and tidy.
My husband and I found the park quiet and therapeutic.
Would recommend this park
A great little  gamily run caravan park for a visit to the Clare Valley wine region . Good location , friendly staff and really clean amenities .
An absolutely lovely And very well kept small park perfectly located and extremely clean . Very easy spaces to manoeuvre into even with a large Van would highly recommend staying there
Stayed with 3 other couples in caravans a great little park with terrific hosts and we all had a fantastic time in the Clare Valley

Very clean park located in the middle of Riesling and Rattler rail trails.  Excellent camp kitchen. The reason for only 4 stars was uncontrolled dogs, and the fact that dogs seem to be allowed in all the facilities.  I don't want to use a camp kitchen when someone has their dog in there, and I sure as he'll don't want their "fur baby" jumping up at me.  If there are dog rules, they're not enforced.
Six of us travellers from all over the country converged here to start our adventure. Hayley and Michael are the fabulous young owners of this small but delightful park. Thank you guys!

A last minute booking for a powered site was a stroke of luck for us.  We spent 3 nights here in a beautifully kept park. The facilities are very clean and well maintained. Michael was a very charming and friendly host with a welcoming smile and a wealth of local knowledge. Highly recommend this park with its quiet, rural location. Being next door to a winery didn't hurt either.
Awesome little caravan park!  Owned and operated by owners. Very quiet with great grass sites. Wineries within walking distance

This is a must stay caravan park when visiting the Clare valley.

Don’t drive by and miss out.

The difference between a good park and a great park is the care and attention the owners put into it.

You can see the attention to detail every where you look.

Even the locals comment on how the current owners took an ordinary park and turned it into a little gem.

If you like a pleasant welcome, helpful  local knowledge, a quiet and restful stay: this is the place for you.
We were in our caravan. Helpful host and lots of places to go! Went to O'Leary's and Walker! Welldone team! Taylor's was also a highlight 4 us!

When we arrived at Clare Valley Caravan Park,  Michael (owner/manager) greeted us in a warm and friendly manner. He continued to inform us that Seven Hills Pub puts on a great meal and a courtesy bus,  should we be thinking about eating out. We found management to be accommodating at all times. Totally enjoyed our short stay. Will definitely recommend it to others.

Awesome little caravan park in a brilliant location.
Wineries by the dozen a short ride or drive away. Superb bike trails very close.

This is an extremely well maintained park. Highly recommend
Boutique caravan park with lovely family owners. In the heart of wine country and lots to see and do in the area. Dog friendly too.

We couldnt get into the caravan park closer to town but so happy we found Clare Valley Caravan Park. Lovelly owners and very accomodating. Location is very convenient to walking trail and wineries. The cost was also reasonable, almost half the cost of the other park.
Great park, great owners sure beats staying in a big overpriced parked. I would recommend this park to anyone. Clean neat facilities & very helpful owners

Great little park run by Michael and Hayley. Clean and tidy park looked after with pride.
Great location to head into Clare and surrounding areas with 2 wineries walking distance. Good size bays.
Highly recommend Craig and Karen WA.
Great rooms and service, the lovely gentleman at front was great to talk to and provided a pleasant service for us

Lovely small family owned and run CVP, we stayed in the Clare cabin which was well equipped with full size oven. Very clean and super comfortable. Our favourite part of the day was sitting on the veranda in the warm morning sun. The other benefit was it was a 3 minute walk to Claymore Wines 😀

Fantastic privately owned caravan park just out of Clare. Michael & Hayley are wonderful host and the park has lots of lush green grass areas and very good amenities. Couldn’t ask for anything more. Well done. 😊🌻. Kate & Craig. Site 21 is awesome.

Fantastic little find, amenities spotless , grounds spotless, would highly recommend this privately owned park , best staying in a huge park with things that you just don’t need . Walking distance to 2 wineries and great place to base with a bike .
Lovely little caravan park. Clean. Good drinking water
Far enough off the highway to not hear the traffic
Great CP, excellent location to visit the wineries and explore the beautiful region. Host very friendly with  try h a lot of to local knowledge. Highly recommend 👍

A great little caravan park. The owners were very friendly & helpful. The cabin had everything we needed, comfy beds & couch. and everything worked. The deck space was brilliant for gathering the family that were also staying in the park. Allowing the dog to come was a bonus. Highly recommend this caravan park .

We stayed at the Clare Valley Caravan Park in our caravan for 4 nights and couldn't have been more impressed. The entire park was well maintained and the sites were well cared for with nice grass. Dog friendly and peaceful. Close to a couple of wineries as well as the Riesling Trail. Would highly recommend.
Lovely park and super friendly hosts

Brought our caravan here for a quick weekend break, and absolutely loved it.  The facilities were fantastic, people friendly, and a great location.  We've visited the clare valley before, but would come back here in a moment.  Close to good cycling, and great wineries.  Brilliant.
Great little campground with very clean facilities and welcoming, friendly owners. We had a lovely good sized grass pitch. Highly recommend.

This was a lovely intimate caravan park. We were tenting and our spot was on lovely comfy green grass under a tree, close to the amenities. The amenities were small but clean and tidy. In the showers there were plenty of hooks and a small shelf to put your things on and not get wet as it was on the back of the door.

It would be great to if it had a small plunge pool for the adults to cool off in. This caravan park is designed for adults as there is no play ground which was nice. This helped make it a quiet setting to stay in. We will be back!!!!
Thanks guys. Clean, neat and tidy caravan park. Good access to Riesling Trail. Nice cellar door next door. See you next time! Thanks again for accommodating our late checkout. Cheers Leighton

Camped here for 2 nights with family and wish we could have stayed longer. Michael was so helpful during check in and provided us with a map and great recommendations on where to go and what to see. Everything we tried was spot on. Bathrooms were lovely and clean and park was so friendly and safe. Will definitely camp here again when we are in the area. Thanks for a great stay!!

Last night of 4 here. Definitely not long enough. A little privately owned gem in the heart of the beautiful Clare Valley.  Michael and Hayley have really put love into this place! Can't recommend it enough! Great informative friendly hosts, impeccably clean and beautifully laid out. Sad to leave..Definitely our favourite stop so far on a big trip..thanks so much.  Nikki, Jethro and Buster 🥰🐾

Our unplanned stay at the Clare Valley Caravan Park reignited our holiday with comfortable surroundings and awesome hospitality.  Michael and Hayley were so welcoming and their knowledge of the area meant that our short time there was well spent, with what the beautiful Clare Valley has to offer. The nearby winery and courtesy bus suggestions were spot on. We would definitely stay here again,  hopefully for longer next time.

I recently stayed at Clare Valley Caravan Park and had a wonderful experience. The staff were exceptionally friendly and helpful, making the check-in process smooth and welcoming. The grounds were beautifully maintained, and the amenities were spotless, which made for a very comfortable stay. The park itself was incredibly quiet and peaceful, providing a perfect atmosphere for relaxation. It's clear that the team takes pride in keeping the park in great condition. I highly recommend Clare Valley Caravan Park for anyone looking for a peaceful getaway with great service and facilities!

Fabulous location, peaceful and the most welcoming family run business. Was such a wonderful experience to be away from the large holiday parks full of noise and instead spend more quality time as a family playing lawn games and enjoying nature.

Hayley & Michael are very friendly helpful hosts who have put a lot of time and effort into making a beautiful well presented park, lush grass and large gravel sites,  quaint very clean amenities, would highly recommend if staying in the area

When our plans changed last minute Michael and Hayley were only too accommodating!!! From the moment we arrived Michael was so welcoming and recommended what we should do on our visit.
The following day Hayley also offered her tips on the hot spots we should visit!

When we were forced to stay another day due to car issues it was no bother for Michael and Hayley.

The park is absolutely beautiful. The amenities and clean and well kept. The sites level and not crammed in like sardines!

This small boutique dog friendly park is an absolute must if staying in the Clare Valley.

Quiet, Affordable and Friendly I would hands down say this is the best boutique caravan park we have stayed in on our travels.
Thank you for your hospitality Michael and Hayley. We cannot wait to be back for another visit.

We recently had the pleasure of staying at Clare Valley Caravan Park in Leasingham. We were travelling around SA for 4 weeks and we stayed at several parks but Clare Valley was by far the best park of our trip. Michael and Hayley have the place looking and running fantastic. If you like a relaxed friendly environment with no jumping castles, this place is for you. Close to everything and dog friendly.

Michael and Hayley are just the BEST owner/operators around. Amenities are always perfect, Michael’s knowledge of the area is so helpful, location is perfect. If you are looking for a relaxed stay in Clare this is definitely the place to go and I can guarantee that you will extend your stay.
Perfect for an overnighter site in Clare Valley. Nestled between vineyards and neat amenities.
A beautiful, immaculate little caravan park.  Highly recommend staying here if you are in the Clare region.
What a little gem. We stayed for two nights, lovely quiet spot, spotless amenities and park. The owners are very welcoming and friendly. Will definitely be back. 😊

A very warm welcome from the park owner operators Michael & Hayley. They provide a well maintained clean tidy park, with loads of information & insights into the region. Conveniently located in the central heart of the beautiful Clare Valley with cabins or powered sites available. We initially booked for 3 nights on a grassed powered site with our 22' caravan  but chose to stay an extra 2 nights. We will be back!
What a great little park this is...a bit of a hidden gem for sure but you know what they say. LOCATION LOCATION LOCATION!!!...

We totally recommend this park! Hayley and Michael are wonderful hosts. They are very knowledgeable about food and wine in the area and give great advice on recommended stops on the Riesling Track. The camp facilities are clean and well- cared for. Definitely worth a stay next time you are in the Clare Valley!
Great little park ran buy great passionate owners

What a wonderful little park. Very well maintained, grounds were clean and tidy.
Amenities although a little dated, were spotless, plenty of hot water and an extra little touch with indoor plant and decorative mirror, giving that homely feel.
Extra special thank you to Michael (owner) who had no hesitation helping us with our van on arrival, very much appreciated. Another reason to support the independent parks. Would highly recommend staying at this park.

We came for 3 nights, stayed for 4 and wished it could have been a lot longer! One of the best parks we have stayed in (and we have stayed in many). The owners - Hayley and Michael -  do the most outstanding job of running this Park - from Hayley’s greeting on arrival delivered with a very helpful array of local knowledge about where to go and what to do to Michael’s help with our set up. Wonderful location, beautifully kept, great facilities and most importantly for us, peaceful 😊

Perfect quiet and peaceful location. Hardly hear any road noise.  Easy drive or bike ride north to Clare or South to Auburn-very central. Reisling trail right here. Clean amenities. Hosts are friendly, helpful and have had great communication pre and during stay. We grew up in the area and it’s  been nice to come back and stay in a new place. Will definitely be back. Julianne & David Wilksch.

Hayley and her family run/manage this stunning caravan park. Everything with the accommodation in the lead up, during our stay and after was perfection. We had a sick little girl and Hayley went out of her way to provide us with everything we needed which we forgot to pack. The Clare Valley Caravan Park is located in stunning surroundings, the views are gorgeous. It’s a nice quiet park, everyone’s so friendly. The caravan park facilities and the entire park, are so clean and modern. Walking distance to family friendly wineries and tracks topped it off! 🍷Would 100% recommend and will be coming back again!
Lovely privately owned camp ground. Clean and well maintained.

A great little caravan park. So quiet and suited to the more mature traveller. The facilities are excellent and the location is very good right near wineries, pubs and cafes. The owners are great....friendly and very helpful with providing local knowledge.

We just stayed 4 nights and what an amazing time.
The location is perfect, it is in the heart of the wineries. Close to the Riesling Trail.
Hayley and Michael the owners of the park do an amazing job.
From check in, ensuring you know where to go within the area.
Awesome restaurants, wineries and sites advice.
We were even able to get bikes delivered and picked up from the park.
A courtesy bus to the Seven Hills Hotel. Which I must say was also beautiful.
They are doing a great job doing the park up.
Very clean and tidy.
We would highly recommend a stay here.

We stayed on a grassed caravan site -the staff eye so friendly in checking and recommendations
They gave big plans to renovate or redo the toilet and laundry facilities which were more than adequate although dated
You won’t be disappointed

We had 4nights in this lovely smaller caravan park.     This park is run by a lovely, very friendly and helpful young couple who are gradually updating the park which you notice as soon as you drive in.
The amenities are older but very tidy and spotless as is the park with many new plants throughout which look great.
There are so many beautiful wineries to visit in Clare and a couple just around the corner, very handy!
We were very comfortable and felt very ‘at home’ for our fabulous stay in Clare and would definitely recommend a stay!

Fantastic stay again - had a new caravan site. Park improvements are really great with more to come.Thanks to Michael and Hayley - always friendly and welcoming.
Highly recommend this park in Leasingham.

Nice location and service. Losses a star for having a crap dryer that is tiny and ineffective and still charges a similar cost for half an hour as other parks. Can't do smaller increments either. Really should just upgrade to a better dryer, especially in a climate that often isn't conducive to drying clothes.
Great little caravan park very close to the Riesling trail. Clean, neat, dog and people friendly.
Beautiful caravan park with great and friendly personal service. Immaculate amenities and overall very looked after. Slightly off the highway and very quiet.
Highly recommend this caravan park - beautiful location, quiet, beautifully maintained a true credit to the owners. A private family run business, we will be back

Clare valley Caravan park is incredible I’m so happy we came across this absolute Gem.
The owners are extremely friendly and can’t do enough for you and what they have achieved in the park is next level amazing.
All amenities extremely clean,everything you would want when you’re away from home and right in the heart of so many incredible places, thank you for our lovely stay.
Thank you for a wonderful stay.

Brilliantly located campsite for seeing the sights of Clare and biking on the Riesling Trail. Clean and modern facilities with friendly and helpful host. The layout and size of the park made it easy to set up the caravan and was puddle free even in rainy conditions whilst we were there.
Very clean and a friendly caravan park .great facilities .friendly staff
A little way from town but a pleasant small park .

We loved our stay at CVCP! Hayley could not have been more helpful! A very clean park, large sites and very quiet which is nicely landscaped too. The weather was wet and cold but the grassed sites didn't get boggy or anything. Clean facilities, and walking distance to a couple of wineries. We will stay again!

Michael & Hayley take great pride in their caravan park & it shows! Spotlessly clean & readily available to assist in any queries even with our annex during the recent 30+ kms winds & rain! Great few days get away. We will be back. Thank you!
Wonderful caravan park owned by a lovely, helpful couple. Immaculate small park which I would definitely recommend. Loved the winter rate of $35 per night for a powered site.

We first stayed 2 years ago just after Michael and Hayley bought the park. It was so lovely to return and see how many improvements they have made. Friendly and helpful service and the cleanest amenities you'll find anywhere. We wouldn't stay anywhere else 😊

What a fantastic hidden gem Michael & Hayley are creating. The park is spotless with a great fire pit & is extremely peaceful yet close enough to great wineries 🍷🥂
We will certainly be going back 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
Excellent facilities, young couple have made the Park a peaceful haven.

We stayed here for the weekend. Michael is an outstanding host who spent a good 15 minutes pointing out the local attractions on a map. One of the best parks we have stayed. The only thing I could say is parking for towing vehicles is a bit tight. We would definitely stay again 😀
A fantastic park. In the heart of the Clare valley. Great facilities, quiet and friendly atmosphere. 10/10

Wonderful caravan park.
Clean amenities.
Would be improved if they had more cooking facilities in the camp kitchen.

What a cracker! Selfishly almost reluctant to share though hosts Hayley and Michael well deserve the accolades for this impressive small park. A hassle free informative stay. Thanks for being such welcoming hosts, you have this nailed 👌
Beautifully clean and well organised boutique caravan park! Hosts Michael and Hayley were so friendly and accommodating. Loved our quiet little stay 💕
Absolutely immaculate park. Very quiet and the hosts are great. Definitely coming back!
Very helpful owners , clean park and cabins,  very tidy park

Best kept secret in the Clare Valley region.
Proprietors Hayley and Michael delightful along with Fletcher ( poodle cross)their marketing manager . Such enthusiasm shown regarding surrounding areas and future plans for their business. The park is small. We were parked on a lovely grassed area (with the guidance of Michael).
and our two dogs. Will definitely stay longer next visit.  A great find! Thank you.

From the first phone contact to driving out after a 2 night stay every interaction was welcoming and enthusiastic! Hayley was keen to share the fabulous surroundings and Michael was a great guide for parking up! The park was immaculate and the enthusiasm for their plans for the park’s future contagious! We look forward to another visit!!!
Great little caravan park , clean amenities friendly staff.

We stayed in our caravan in an exceptional gravel site. Water pressure was very good. Very few toilets and a small camp kitchen is the only negative i have. We will make this our Clare Valley destination in the future.
What a beautiful caravan park, fantastic couple who own, they have certainly made an enormous effort in creating a gorgeous caravan park. Highly recommend this wonderfull caravan park.

What a find!!! This boutique park is a must. It is quiet, well-maintained and close to the Riesling cycle trail. Michael was very friendly and helpful with local knowledge of the area. It is a short drive into Clare, but this didn’t concern us as the surrounding area is beautiful. Claymore wines next door is worth a visit as is Watervale Hotel (also not far). Well done on the work you have done so far, we look forward to returning again and will definitely recommend.
Great friendly service from a husband and wife team that have a great vision for the future. Small but spotlessly clean amenities round out the picture. Best wishes for the future!!
An beautifully run place, clean, tidy, quiet.  Level sites, choice of grass or gravel and Michael is a great source of info on what to do etc.  Would definitely return if in the Clare Valley.

Great little caravan park. Congrats to the owners, Hayley and Michael. The improvements you have already made show your commitment to improving the park. Hopefully your house will be completed soon and then be able to complete the upgrade to the back area. We look forward to our next visit to see the changes. The grass is well maintained and the new road base sites look great. Would certainly recommend everyone to book this park if travelling to the Clare Valley.
Great service, very neat and tidy park. Excellent location. Would highly recommend.
Great little caravan park, very friendly and helpful owners with great facilities .
Very nice camp site, well located and clean. Short walk to wine tasting.

Great caravan park. Good location in the Clare Valley. Staff very friendly. Only problem was the wasps. You couldn't cook outside due to this. Hopefully the owners can do something to get rid of them.

Der einzige Caravan Park in der Nähe, der privat von einem Ehepaar geführt wird. Klein und familiär. Sie stecken sehr viel Liebe und Herzblut hinein und sind sehr aufmerksam. Geben Empfehlungen und wissen genau, wer auf den Campingplatz gehört und wer nicht. Die Toiletten und duschen waren sehr gepflegt, die Küche war super sauber und gut ausgestattet. Wäsche waschen ist auch möglich.

Great little spot nestled between the wineries with fantastic facilities and staff.
Walking distance to O'Leary' Walker and Claymore wines and a neat little camp kitchen. Will be back.

Very nice small family run park in great location near Watervale but off the main road so lovely and quiet. Very helpful owner who made recommendations which were spot on. It was a bonus to enjoy the courtesy bus to Seven Hills pub.
Whilst some of the facilities are somewhat dated we can see that they are in process of updating and we happily recommend staying here.
Good 👍

Excellent caravan park...perfect in all sense especially for adults.
We will always come back here when in the Clare as standard of service relative the price charged is outstanding.
Thank you so much.

This is a little gem of a caravan park. You can see what the new owners are really trying to do to upgrade and update the place. It is in a perfect spot to walk to a couple of great wineries or take a short drive. Really quiet and friendly, recommend staying there. Pet friendly too.

Our work team of 18 enjoyed two glorious days camping at the camp site for a 'no work getaway' to enjoy some fun and frivolity in beautiful Clare Valley. Hosts Michael and Hayley were extremely welcoming and accommodating with their superb customer service. The amenities are extremely clean and well kept , as are the grounds.
Great little Caravan Park. Fabulous service.

Thoroughly enjoyed our stay at this lovely little caravan park.  Very dog friendly with nice lawns that our puppy loved.  Sites are on gravel and are  a decent size.  Amenities spotless and well thought out and stocked camp kitchen.  Owner was very knowledgeable about best places to go, particularly with our pooch and using it as our travel guide were not disappointed in any of his recommendations!  May be a while before we get a chance, but we'll definitely be back
Sehr sauberer und gut organisierter CP, gut gelegen für den Riesling Trail. Die Eigner geben sich grosse Mühe..

Really great park. The new owners Michael and Hayley are putting a huge effort into modernising this place and their efforts to date show that this will continue to get even better. The location is great with Riesling Trail bike track about 500m away that takes you either direction Auburn or to Clare with many wineries on the way. Would definitely stay again.
Excellent clean very quiet park, very pleasant owner, close to Clare town with lots of interesting places to visit, close by. Will definitely stay again. Highly recommended
Ruhiger Ort, Sauber, aufgeräumt, gute Duschen und Toilette. Trinkwasser an jedem Stellplatz.

Hands down one of the best caravan parks we have stayed at. Small, quiet, with clean ablutions. You can wake up to the sound of birds chirping!  Location is awesome- you can walk to wineries on the Riesling trail. The best coffee shop is only 5 minutes away. The owners Michael & Hayley are so lovely and are happy to share their knowledge of the area with you. We will definitely come back here again.
Terrible and Rude service... Called to book a site and lady was rude due to the type of car we drive... My car is like a foot longer than the average ute... Good luck with rules like that
Facilities were very clean. Park was well kept. Recommendations on where to eat were spot on.

A great caravan site, quiet and well maintained. Privately owned and the owner was very helpful in suggesting places to visit locally.
Highly recommended, would definitely stay again.

This was our first stay here and what a surprise,  its a great little park and will continue to get better.  Has a fantastic kitchen that feels like home. The staff are very helpful even mapping out their recommendations for places to visit,  if the bakery next door was open I would have been in heaven,  but we will be back back.

Thank you for your hospitality and sharing your hidden little gem!

In the last twelve months we have stayed at numerous parks; on this occasion, not knowing where we were going or what to expect we were and are in awe of what you have created, testament to you both.

Not all travellers want the big “flashy” pools, playgrounds etc; (it) was so nice to just sit and enjoy the serenity.

Again thank you for a fabulous weekend.
Loved our Long weekend at the caravan park, nice little park, fantastic location, clean amenities, small camp kitchen if u need, lovely big bbq, welcoming owners, enjoyed our stay and will be back
Nice neat park
Recently changed management. Rooms in the cabin are spotless, simple but well designed, have all the basics, clean, everything seems brand new. Park toilets are very clean. Strongly recommend it
Fantastic boutique caravan park. Amenities are spotless, with a very well equipped camp kitchen. Owners are very friendly and accommodating. Highly recommended.
Great little park heading in the right direction with young enthusiastic owners  working hard to provide a real caravan park at very low rates. Keep up the good work.

What a fantastic little caravan park! Obviously a lot of thought has been put into the upgrades by the new owners and in a very short time they’ve created a modern, clean, fresh looking caravan park. Extreamly friendly and welcoming owners, the park itself has really good sized caravan pitches and great amenities. Also dog friendly. Right next to the Riesling Trail and close to some awesome Clare wineries. A great park that we will definitely be back to visit and highly recommend to all 🤩

Second stay at the park. We were here about 12 months ago and it's great to see the progress that has been made. It is very pleasing to see what a couple with vision are making and will continue to make of this park. Ideally located for seeing what the Clare has to offer. Michael and Hayley are a walking/talking advertisement of what to do and see. Highly recommend this park to everyone. Good luck to you both.
